title: croton glaber
intro: Croton glaber, also known as the smooth croton, is a plant species within the Euphorbiaceae family. It is primarily found in the tropical regions of Central and South America, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The smooth croton is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared by making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves, which are then used to treat various health conditions.
